block_10: account ki sesh raashi se kaat liya jayega:
block_15: Hum aapke credit card ya aapke dvaara upyog kiye gaye kisi anya bhugtaan maadhyam se shulk nahin lenge. Rashi aapke
block_17: account ke shesh rashi se kaat li jayegi.
block_18: Seva shulk prati maah 10 Euro se adhik nahin hoga (ya shulk ki katauti ke din kisi anya mudra me samtulya rashi.
block_19: Yadi aapke account ke shesh raashi me purn seva shulk ke liye uplabdh dhanraashi nahin hai, to company ke vivekaanusar kum shulk liya ja sakta hai taaki nakaraatmak account shesh se bacha ja sake.
block_20: Yadi aapke account ki shesh rashi me 10 Euro nishkriyta account shulk ke liye uplabdh dhanraashi hai, to puri rashi kaat li jayegi.
block_21: NISHKRIYATA ACCOUNT SHULK KE BAARE ME ADHIK JAANAKAARI
block_22: Aapke paas abhi bhi seva shulk se bachne ka samay hai
block_23: Yadi aap humare saath trade karna jaari rakhna chaahte hain, to apne account ko sakriya sthiti me vaapas laane ke liye bas platform par koi deal karen. Aapke account se seva shulk nahin liya jayega.
block_26: ke saath trade karne me koi dilchaspi nahin hai to aap nikaasi ka anurodh kar sakte hain, aur ise jald hi sansaadhit kiya jayega. Aapka account khaali ho jaane ke baad, ise band kar diya jayega.
block_29: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki sarahaana karte hain.
block_30: *Company ke saamanya shulk niti ke anusaar, 10 Euro graahak ke account me dhan ki uplabdhata par nirbhar purn seva shulk hai.
